tools.name: get_stock_rating
tools.description: Get MELANY's current data-driven rating for one U.S. stock or ETF: conviction tier, 0-100 composite score, the eight factor scores (valuation, quality, momentum, earnings, sentiment, catalyst, risk-adjusted, macro fit), top flagged risks, and theme context. tools.name: compare_stocks
tools.description: Compare 2 to 5 U.S. stocks or ETFs side by side on MELANY ratings: conviction tier, composite score, and the valuation / quality / momentum factor scores. Free public data from Market Eyes Live (marketeyeslive.com).

tools.name: get_mortgage_rate_context
tools.description: Get today's public U.S. mortgage-rate context from Market Eyes Live's Lock Radar (marketeyeslive.com): the current 10-year Treasury yield and direction, mortgage-backed securities (MBS) momentum, and the overall rate environment (falling, stable, or rising) that drives mortgage rates.
